title: Boat Hire Hourly in Marbella Port: Costs, Tips and 2026 Guide
html:
Marbella Port, the glistening Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, is your gateway to the Mediterranean for flexible hourly boat hire starting from €250. Whether you want a quick spin along the Golden Mile or a longer exploration, BoatHire24 connects you with verified local operators offering self-drive and crewed options.

How much does it cost to rent a boat by the hour in Marbella Port?

Hourly rates start around €250 for a basic motorboat and go up to €1,500 for a crewed luxury yacht. Most operators require a minimum of two to three hours. To get accurate real-time prices and availability, use the platform to compare verified boat listings across Marbella Port. You can compare verified boat listings in a few minutes.

  • Shared tour (per person): from €50 per hour
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): from €200
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): from €800
  • Crewed yacht with skipper: from €1,200 for half-day

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Marbella Port?

For most powerboats under 15 metres, a valid boating licence (such as the Spanish "Patrón de Navegación Básica") is required. However, many hire companies offer bareboat charters to experienced skippers without a licence if you hold an equivalent international certificate. The operator will confirm exact requirements at the time of booking. One option worth a look is the Salty Sun Charters for hire.

If you hire a small open boat without a licence, the company may insist on a short on-water briefing and restrict you to within one nautical mile of Marbella's coastline, perfect for a relaxed swim stop near Cabopino.

Where to set off in Marbella Port

Depart from Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, a modern marina with 750 berths and full services. From there, you can head west to Puerto Banús, the glamorous marina three nautical miles away, or east to the Calahonda coastline. Further afield, the bay of Estepona is a pleasant 12-nautical-mile cruise, and the island of Isla Verde provides a scenic anchorage south of Marbella. The nearby town of San Pedro de Alcántara offers a quieter marina alternative.

Which boat to rent for an hourly trip in Marbella Port

Consider these popular options available through BoatHire24: If you own a boat, you can rent out your boat and earn from spare days.

  1. Motorboat (4-6 hours), Best for a quick tour of the Marbella coastline, ideal for small groups. Capacity: 6 guests. From €250 per hour.
  2. Rib or speedboat, Perfect for watersports enthusiasts who want to tow a ringo or wakeboard. Capacity: 8 guests. From €300 per hour.
  3. Catamaran, Stable and spacious, suited for a relaxing family cruise with a sun deck. Capacity: 12 guests. From €500 per hour.
  4. Axopar or similar crossover, A stylish, versatile boat for those who value both design and performance. Capacity: 9 guests. From €400 per hour.
  5. Crewed yacht (Azimut or Sunseeker), For a luxury experience with a professional skipper and host. Capacity: 10 guests. From €1,200 per hour.

For a specific example, check the Salty Sun Charters for hire, a well-rated motor yacht based in Marbella Port that offers hourly charters with flexible itineraries.

Best season for hourly boat hire in Marbella Port

The high season runs from June to September, when daytime temperatures exceed 30°C and the prevailing Poniente wind keeps the sea calm. May and October also offer pleasant conditions with fewer crowds. In summer, the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon, so an early morning departure is often wisest. To see how booking works, visit the boat search.

At a glance

  • Hourly price band: €50, €1,500
  • Peak months: June, July, August, September
  • Typical trip length: 2, 8 hours
  • Maximum guest capacity: 6, 12 depending on boat
  • Currency: EUR

How to book an hourly boat in Marbella Port

Booking through BoatHire24 is straightforward. Use the boat search to filter by hourly availability, boat type, and price. Once you find a suitable listing, you can reserve instantly online and pay securely in EUR. The platform handles all communication with the owner, so you can confirm exact departure times and any special requests.

Questions about boat rental in Marbella Port

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Marbella Port?

Yes, many operators allow self-drive hire if you hold a recognised boating licence and are over 18 years old.

What is included in the hourly rental price?

Typically, the price includes fuel, basic safety equipment, and insurance, but you should check each listing as extras like a skipper or water toys cost more.

Are pets allowed on board?

Some owners welcome well-behaved dogs, so always ask before booking; listings on BoatHire24 often mention pet policies.

Can I cancel my hourly booking?

Cancellation terms vary by operator, but many offer free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella Port or list your own. Whether you are a visitor seeking a short Mediterranean adventure or a boat owner wanting to offset costs, the platform simplifies the process. If you own a boat in Marbella Port, consider joining the community and rent out your boat to help others discover the Costa del Sol from the water.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella Port and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
